ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "map" TEXT /* Name of the map where the match was played */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the match was played */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the match was played */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "wait_time_s" INTEGER /* Wait time in seconds before the match started */,
  "match_time_s" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in seconds */,
  "team_a_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds won by Team A */,
  "team_b_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds won by Team B */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win, Lost, Tie) */,
  "match_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match started */,
  "match_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match ended */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators watching the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match is part of */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee overseeing the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_map FOREIGN KEY ("map") REFERENCES maps ("map_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_result FOREIGN KEY ("result") REFERENCES results ("result_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Size of the map (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of the map (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (Win, Lost, Tie) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., AWPer, In-game leader) */,
  "joined_team_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "ping" INTEGER /* Ping of the player during the match */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player during the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player during the match */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player during the match */,
  "mvps" INTEGER /* Number of MVPs awarded to the player during the match */,
  "hs_percent" REAL /* Percentage of headshot kills by the player during the match */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player during the match */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the player */,
  "bomb_plants" INTEGER /* Number of bomb plants by the player */,
  "bomb_defuses" INTEGER /* Number of bomb defuses by the player */,
  "clutches_won" INTEGER /* Number of clutches won by the player */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of team statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics are for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics are for */,
  "rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of rounds won by the team during the match */,
  "total_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the team */,
  "total_damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the team */,
  "bombs_planted" INTEGER /* Total number of bombs planted by the team */,
  "bombs_defused" INTEGER /* Total number of bombs defused by the team */,
  "clutches_won" INTEGER /* Total number of clutches won by the team */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
